faqs.question: What is the scope of MBA?
faqs.answer:
The scope of MBA course is increasing day by day. MBA is one of the big job oriented professional programme and the most one which has been sought by the students. Once you have completed your degree, you have a great job opportunity in the industrial world. You may the manager or executive in term of designation.
The management term is most suited to the managers and that's why it is the way, where you can reach on the top of the height as soon as possible by using your leadership and working proficiency. An MBA professional always plays a vital role in his/her company and this is why he used to keep in touch with the board of directors. No need to specify the companies who recruit the MBA professionals. All sectors including government and public have various industries, companies, institutions or related organizations, come in the job prospective fields for an MBA professional.
Some job profiles are listed here:
Brand Manager
Account Manager
International Business Manager
Marketing Executive
Business Technical Consultant
All the best.

faqs.question: How can I get into Ranippettai Engineering College for UG/PG courses? Am I eligible for admission?
faqs.answer:
Ranippettai Engineering College has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:
Courses Eligibility
B.E. / B.Tech Candidate must have passed VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. from schools situated in Tamil Nadu. Tamil Nadu native candidate who have passed any of the VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. or their equivalent exam from schools situated outside Tamil Nadu can also apply. They should produce Original Nativity Certificate. Children of Central Government Employees, irrespective of their nativity, provided their parents or guardians (only if both parents are not alive) have been serving in Tamil Nadu continuously for the past five years can be eligible to apply. Sons & daughters of All India service Tamil Nadu cadre officers are eligible to apply. A Self declaration from the parent in this regard is to be produced. Children of employees in the Public Sector or Government recognised institutions had been working in their organisations for the past five years are also eligible, irrespective of their domicile. Other State candidates who have studied VIII, IX, X, XI and XII Std. in Tamil Nadu are eligible to apply.
MBA/PGDM Candidate must have completed Bachelor's degree of minimum 3 years duration with minimum 50% (45 % for reserved category). The qualifying degree examination can be 10+2+3/4/5 years pattern or 10+3 years Diploma +3 years pattern or B.E./B.Tech./B.Arch./B.Pharm. or 10+2+AMIE or 10+3 years Diploma + AMIE. AMIE candidate must have 2 years regular full time experience in the relevant field. Candidates admitted through Lateral Entry in degree courses are not eligible. Candidates with degree obtained without studying 10th/12th Std. or 3 years degree programme are not eligible. Candidates appearing for the final semester/year are also eligible.
M.E./M.Tech Candidate must have completed B.E/B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engg. Candidate belonging to reserved category must have 45% in qualifying examination. Candidate who have completed 10+2+AMIE or 10+3 years Diploma + AMIE are also eligible. AMIE candidate must have 2 years regular full time experience in the relevant field. Candidates with B.E./B.Tech. degrees obtained through Distance/Weekend mode are not eligible. Candidates with degree obtained without studying 10th/12th Std. or 3 years degree programme are not eligible. Candidates appearing for the final semester/year are also eligible.

faqs.question: Is the BTech Mechanical Engineering syllabus the same for all colleges?
faqs.answer:
The BTech Mechanical Engineering syllabus is not the same across all colleges, as every college committee sets a particular coursework pattern at the start of every academic year to be followed for the respective batch. The syllabus includes some core subjects, interesting electives, and lab work that gives detailed knowledge to the students about the workings of the field. 
Helpful Link: Mechanical Engineering Subjects in Detail

faqs.question: What do Electrical Engineering professionals do?
faqs.answer:
Electrical Engineering professionals are engineering jack of all trades, as they make use of their knowledge of Physics and Mathematics along with computer programming skills to develop intricate circuit systems. These circuit boards run electrical signals to and from electrical components to accomplish everything from a mundane computer startup to controlling absolute power and precision of a rocket going out of earth's atmosphere.
Know more about -
Electrical Engineering Courses

fees_and_eligibility.overview: At the UG and PG levels, Ranippettai Engineering College offers a diverse range of progammes. Candidates can choose Full Time courses, from streams like Engineering and Business & Management Studies. College offers B.E. / B.Tech courses at the UG level. While, at the PG level, the college offers available programmes like M.E./M.Tech and MBA/PGDM. The Ranippettai Engineering College course fee ranges between INR 35,000 to 2,00,000.

faqs.answer: A:    Ranippettai Engineering College offers Degree courses including 6 UG and 4 PG courses. These programs are offerred in Full Time mode. Ranippettai Engineering College has specializations such as B.Tech specializations in Civil Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Information Technology, Electrical Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, M.E./M.Tech specializations in Communications Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Power Engineering.
faqs.question: Which major specializations are available at Ranippettai Engineering College?

faqs.answer: A:    Ranippettai Engineering College has courses such as B.Tech, MBA/PGDM, M.E./M.Tech to offer. These courses are in the stream of Engineering, Business & Management Studies. Ranippettai Engineering College offers specializations such as B.Tech specializations in Civil Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Information Technology, Electrical Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, M.E./M.Tech specializations in Communications Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Power Engineering.
faqs.question: Which courses does Ranippettai Engineering College offer to students?

faqs.answer: A:    The overall seats available across all courses offered by Ranippettai Engineering College is up to 576. Good thing to know is that Ranippettai Engineering College has courses which are approved by prominent Government bodies like AICTE.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: Ranippettai Engineering College is the best college in Vellore.

review_content.Placements: Ranippettai Engineering College gives the best placement results every year. Above 90 percent of my batch students placed in good companies. Some students were also placed in foreign companies. So this college is one of the best engineering colleges in Vellore.
review_content.Infrastructure: Ranippettai Engineering College's infrastructure is very good. The full college campus is maintained every day. More departments and courses are available, so more laboratories are available for this college. The college hostel and food are very hygienic. More sports grounds are available for this college.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: The college has good infrastructure, faculty members and modern technology.

review_content.Placements: Around 70% of students get placed on campus. The rest of the students get placed after completing their course. The highest package offered to freshers is about 10,000 per month, and the lowest package is about 7,000 per month. Some of the midrange companies conduct campus interviews in our college. Some students, about 50%, got internships in the 3rd year itself. Only associate level roles are offered by companies.
review_content.Infrastructure: The facilities in our college are good. It has the latest labs and good faculty members with higher qualifications such as M.E etc. The classrooms are very good and attractive with green boards, new benches, and Wi-Fi facility. Compared to other colleges, all the facilities are good.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2014
reviews_list.review_title: Nice facilities and good placement training are provided for all students here.

review_content.Placements: I am from B.E in mechanical engineering of 2014 passed out batch. More often, about 90% of the students get placed from our course. The lowest salary package is offered since all students are freshers. TCS, Cognizant and Accenture are the topmost companies which visited here for interviews. More than 90% of the students got internships in 3rd year of engineering. When I joined in this college, the IT department has the topmost placement rate.
review_content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are well cleaned, well maintained and tidy here. Wi-Fi facilities should be provided all over the college. The library should be modernised and should be provided with air-conditioning facilities. Moreover, the library also needs to have computerised books. Canteen facilities are good, and the food served is also better.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2018
reviews_list.review_title: I am absolutely dissatisfied because of faculty members and management.

review_content.Placements: None of the students from this course was placed. None of the students got placements on-campus and off-campus placements. There are no top recruiting companies for our course. Top roles are not offered in our course. None of the students got an internship from our course.
review_content.Infrastructure: Lab, classrooms and library are good, but the teachers are less and not much experienced. However, the canteen was nice, and the sports facilities are not much. The transport service is not that good compared to other colleges. Even students who pay the fee will stand in the buses while travelling instead of unpaid students. Teachers will also sit.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2017
reviews_list.review_title: My review about Ranipettai Engineering College.

review_content.Placements: In this college placement assistant is one of the major advantages. The faculty helped to clear the test, while the company test is also explained. Job far is conducted after completing 4 years. I have studied BE Mechanical engineering here and got a job in an MNC company.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college has good infrastructure and lab facilities for all department students. Especially mechanical students have good laboratory facility. We have a good ground for sport and a well-maintained canteen also. The classrooms are good and well-maintained, restrooms are also available.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2017
reviews_list.review_title: Good Infrastructure and laboratory.

review_content.Placements: There is no campus interview in this college. Students have attended the campus interview in other colleges especially in VIT, Vellore. In the current scenario in engineering, only 20% students only get the job. The salary lies between 10 to 30 thousand rupees only. There is no internship all the students are getting the job individually as the college does not help students. The students' future is in their own hand.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college has a good infrastructure. There are 5 blocks for 5 departments with separate classrooms and laboratory. The library has more than 10000 books placed separately for each department. Sports and cultures are conducted every year. Cricket, football, volleyball and athletic games are played and there is a large area for playing games.

admission_process.title: Ranippettai Engineering College Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Ranippettai Engineering College admissions are based on merit. The institute considers applications of candidates meeting the eligibility criteria.Ranippettai Engineering Collegeoffers courses at UG and PG levels. Some of the courses include B.E. / B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech and MBA/PGDM. Candidates can apply online for the preferred course.
The total tuition fees for UG courses isINR 2,00,000. Aspirants may also need to pay one-time caution deposit at the time of admission.
The institute offers UG courses for 4 years. PG courses are offered for 2 years.

courses_data.name: Ranippettai Engineering College B.E. / B.Tech Admission 2025
courses_data.description: Ranippettai Engineering Collegeoffers a4 years B.E. / B.Techcourse to the students. Ranippettai Engineering College B.E. / B.Tech admission is based on a valid TNEA and CBSE 12th score. The university offers the course in 6 specialisations, including Electronics & Communication Engineering, Mechanical Engineering and Civil Engineering and more. Moreover, the selected candidates must payINR 2,00,000at the time of admission forRanippettai Engineering College B.E. / B.Techprogramme.

faqs.question: How can I get into Ranippettai Engineering College for UG/PG courses? Am I eligible for admission?
faqs.answer:
Ranippettai Engineering College has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidate must have passed VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. from schools situated in Tamil Nadu.
Tamil Nadu native candidate who have passed any of the VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. or their equivalent exam from schools situated outside Tamil Nadu can also apply. They should produce Original Nativity Certificate.
Children of Central Government Employees, irrespective of their nativity, provided their parents or guardians (only if both parents are not alive) have been serving in Tamil Nadu continuously for the past five years can be eligible to apply.
Sons & daughters of All India service Tamil Nadu cadre officers are eligible to apply. A Self declaration from the parent in this regard is to be produced.
Children of employees in the Public Sector or Government recognised institutions had been working in their organisations for the past five years are also eligible, irre

faqs.question: How many seats are available at Ranippettai Engineering College for all courses combined?
faqs.answer: The overall seats available across all courses offered by Ranippettai Engineering College is up to 576. Good thing to know is that Ranippettai Engineering College has courses which are approved by prominent Government bodies like AICTE.

description: What's new at Ranippettai Engineering College cut off 2023? TNEA Rank List 2023 is out. To check and download the rank list, candidates must visit the official website of TNEA 2023 at tneaonline.org and login with the username and password. TNEA rank list is also available in the form of PDF. Check TNEA Rank List, here. In case of any queries or grievances regarding the rank, candidates may contact the nearby TNEA Facilitation Center (TFC) on or before Jun 30 (4 PM). Check, the list of TFCs, here. Further, the Online General Counselling for Academic, Govt. School 7.5% category and Vocational candidates is to be held between Jul 7 and Aug 24. reviews.review_heading: Ranippettai Engineering College is the best college in Vellore.
reviews.review_text: Ranippettai Engineering College's infrastructure is very good. The full college campus is maintained every day. More departments and courses are available, so more laboratories are available for this college. The college hostel and food are very hygienic. More sports grounds are available for this college.

reviews.review_heading: The college has good infrastructure, faculty members and modern technology.
reviews.review_text: The facilities in our college are good. It has the latest labs and good faculty members with higher qualifications such as M.E etc. The classrooms are very good and attractive with green boards, new benches, and Wi-Fi facility. Compared to other colleges, all the facilities are good.

reviews.review_heading: Nice facilities and good placement training are provided for all students here.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are well cleaned, well maintained and tidy here. Wi-Fi facilities should be provided all over the college. The library should be modernised and should be provided with air-conditioning facilities. Moreover, the library also needs to have computerised books. Canteen facilities are good, and the food served is also better.

reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely dissatisfied because of faculty members and management.
reviews.review_text: Lab, classrooms and library are good, but the teachers are less and not much experienced. However, the canteen was nice, and the sports facilities are not much. The transport service is not that good compared to other colleges. Even students who pay the fee will stand in the buses while travelling instead of unpaid students. Teachers will also sit.

reviews.review_heading: My review about Ranipettai Engineering College.
reviews.review_text: The college has good infrastructure and lab facilities for all department students. Especially mechanical students have good laboratory facility. We have a good ground for sport and a well-maintained canteen also. The classrooms are good and well-maintained, restrooms are also available.

reviews.review_heading: Good Infrastructure and laboratory.
reviews.review_text: The college has a good infrastructure. There are 5 blocks for 5 departments with separate classrooms and laboratory. The library has more than 10000 books placed separately for each department. Sports and cultures are conducted every year. Cricket, football, volleyball and athletic games are played and there is a large area for playing games.

It’s not a future deciding college. You just going to get the graduate only because there is no placement. There is no extracurricular activities and the campus also not in our expectations. If you choose means better once check the college. In my point of view better to avoid this college for your future. Sorry to say this about the college because I won't want to spoil the others future. It’s not a future deciding college. You just going to get the graduate only because there is no placement. There is no extracurricular activities and the campus also not in our expectations. If you choose means better once check the college. In my point of view better to avoid this college for your future. Sorry to say this about the college because I won't want to spoil the others future.

I am studying in this college. The college atmosphere is good but students’ strength is low and the facilities available in the college are average in nature. There is no college fees for SC/ST students. Overall, the college is average for studies and excellent for having fun. I am studying in this college. The college atmosphere is good but students’ strength is low and the facilities available in the college are average in nature. There is no college fees for SC/ST students. Overall, the college is average for studies and excellent for having fun.

reviews.review_heading: Faculty members and facilities are very good.
reviews.review_text: Our college offers a very good infrastructure and lab facilities for all the departments. We have sports events, innovative events and other extracurricular events. Our college mess offers very good and healthy food for students, and hostel facilities are also very good.

reviews.review_heading: Very worst college for current generation.
reviews.review_text:
1) No Wi-Fi, labs are there but not well maintained. Classroom is the worst because all windows and boards are broken and also they haven't corrected it. 
2) Hostel is okay for middle class people who came from far away. Hostel food is the worst and food will be okay when higher official visit hostel. Canteen is okay and no medical and sports in our college.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college but there is no scope in future.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the campus is fine. The environment on campus is good, but there is no proper canteen facility. Labs are only to show and are not utilized properly. Bathrooms are not good enough for the strength of students. Water should be always purified. Labs are good but not maintain properly and not utilized.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: At the UG and PG levels, Sitapur Shiksha Sansthan Group of Institutions offers a diverse range of progammes. Candidates can choose Full Time courses, from streams like Engineering, Medicine & Health Sciences and Business & Management Studies. College offers B.E. / B.Tech, BCA and B.Pharma courses at the UG level. While, at the PG level, the college offers available programmes like MBA/PGDM. The Sitapur Shiksha Sansthan Group of Institutions course fee ranges between INR 1,00,200 to 2,82,000.

reviews_list.review_title: Lightly dissatisfied because of area.

review_content.Placements: There are many students in my course or branch all are from different cities like Varanasi, mathura, Agra. Many companies visited at the time of placement. Mostly local companies. Many courses offered in B.tech like computer science, mechanical, electronics, electrical.
review_content.Infrastructure: Many facilities provided by the college like labs, library and give preferences to extra curricular activities. You have more than enough time to prepare for further studies. Hostel is very big and good. Every room consists of 2 or 3 students. Mess food is average.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely satisfied because of faculty, good placements in 2017, and really good infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: Our course was the easiest and loved by many. So, more than 30% of students were placed in our course. The packages offered were reasonable. Many top recruiting companies came for our course. 50% of students got internships from MNCs. The roles offered were good.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is average. If you are joining the hostel for the first time, then you will struggle for some days. But my experience was good. The best quality food is provided. Medical facilities are available. If you don't like the food, then you can eat in the canteen. Sports facilities are available for the good health and fitness of students.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2019
reviews_list.review_title: Our college has good Infrastructure and faculty members.

review_content.Placements: Some companies visited here for placements and some students got placements in reputed companies. It is the best college for all courses.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is so good it has a lot of space. The college had all the facilities for students like a library in all the buildings, a play area, and a canteen. There was a huge hall and two computer labs. It also has medical facilities and a hostel for students and quarters for teachers.
review_content.Faculty: All the faculty members of the college are good, helpful, and friendly. The college has a friendly atmosphere. Semesters examinations are held, and we also have sessional exams for internal marking conducted in a very proper way. All the teachers are well educated from reputed universities. The education system here is good.

reviews.review_heading: Lightly dissatisfied because of area.
reviews.review_text: Many facilities provided by the college like labs, library and give preferences to extra curricular activities. You have more than enough time to prepare for further studies. Hostel is very big and good. Every room consists of 2 or 3 students. Mess food is average.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied because of faculty, good placements in 2017, and really good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is average. If you are joining the hostel for the first time, then you will struggle for some days. But my experience was good. The best quality food is provided. Medical facilities are available. If you don't like the food, then you can eat in the canteen. Sports facilities are available for the good health and fitness of students.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has good Infrastructure and faculty members.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is so good it has a lot of space. The college had all the facilities for students like a library in all the buildings, a play area, and a canteen. There was a huge hall and two computer labs. It also has medical facilities and a hostel for students and quarters for teachers.

highlights.summary: KN University, Ahmedabad is an university located in Ahmedabad, Gujarat. KN University, Ahmedabad courses are offered to students at the UG and PG levels. The institute is approved by PCI and offers courses in Full Time mode. KN University, Ahmedabad offers a total of 6 courses in streams such as Engineering, Medicine & Health Sciences, Business & Management Studies and IT & Software. Some of the popular courses offered at the institute are B.E. / B.Tech, MBA/PGDM, MCA, B.Pharma and D.Pharma and the total seat intake for the available courses is 113. These courses are offered to students across several specialisations such as Computer Science Engineering and Information Technology. Further, the fee for all these courses ranges between INR 1,57,500 to 2,80,000. Apart from this, the KN University, Ahmedabad campus has a state-of-the-art infrastructure with all the advanced facilities.

college_info.intro: The flagship programme offered at Nimbus Academy of Management is an MBA. The college provides this programme to students at the PG level. Apart from the MBA course, the college also offers BA, BCA, BCom, BEd, and BBA courses at the UG level. The college offers an MBA programme for a duration of 2 years with a comprehensive curriculum. Nimbus Academy of Management courses strive to enhance the learning experience of students to prepare them for the industry. Candidates can check the popular programmes offered at Nimbus Academy of Management in the table provided below:

placements.overview: The placement cell of the Nimbus Academy of Management is committed to providing students with training and professional opportunities throughout their academic careers. The placement cell maintains contact with various industry sources, organises on-campus training and recruitment and informs the students about placement opportunities. Nimbus Academy of Management offers 100% placement assistance. The college maintains a 98% placement rate. The highest package offered during Nimbus Academy of Management placements 2024 was INR 7 LPA. Top companies visit Nimbus Academy of Management placements such as Paytm, Hike Edu, Genius, Sucess Pact, High Rise, and Card Expertise, among others.

faqs.answer: A:    As per Shiksha verified reviews, Nimbus Academy of Management has an impressive review rating of 5 by 1 students.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Nimbus Academy of Management offers diverse programmes at UG and PG levels in offline mode. The offered programmes can be chosen from streams such as Business & Management Studies, IT & Software and Accounting & Commerce. At the UG level, candidates have the provision to opt from courses such as BCA, B.Com and B.A. Whereas, at PG level, Nimbus Academy of Management offers course such as MBA/PGDM. Nimbus Academy of Management fee structure for all the courses is around INR 60,000 to 2,00,000.

faqs.answer: A:    The MBA fee at Nimbus Academy of Management comprises multiple components, such as tuition fees, hostel fees, mess and other security deposits, etc. The MBA tuition fee at Nimbus Academy of Management is INR 1.4 lakh. faqs.answer: Nimbus Academy of Management is a reputed university. NAM is approved by the AICTE and is affiliated with Uttarakhand Technical University. At the postgraduate level, the Nimbus Academy of Management offers MBA courses to students. The college offers an MBA in ten specialisations Marketing, Finance, Human Resource Management, International Business, Business Analytics, Agri-Business Management, Rural Development, Supply Chain Management, Health Care and Hospital Management, Data Science, and FinTech. MBA students are placed in top companies at top positions. Hence, pursuing an MBA at Nimbus Academy of Management is worth a try.

faqs.answer: The Nimbus Academy of Management conducts the application in online mode on its official website. Additionally, for BA and BCom, candidates are required to visit (sdsuv.samarth.ac.in/) to apply for admission. Mentioned below is a step-by-step process to fill out the Nimbus Academy of Management application form 2025:Step 1: Go through the official website of Nimbus Academy of Management (namdehradun.com/).Step 2: Click on the 'Apply Now' tab.Step 3: Fill out the enquiry form.Step 4: After filling out the enquiry form admission cell directly contacts candidates for further process.
faqs.question: Q: How can I apply for admission to Nimbus Academy of Management, Dehradun?

faqs.answer: Established in 1998, Nimbus Academy of Management (NIMBUS), Dehradun is a private management college. It operates under the guidance of the Doon Educational Trust Society (DETS). The Nimbus Academy of Management, Dehradun fees varies by course and are menioned below:MBA: The total tuition fee for the two-year MBA programme is INR 140,000. BBA: The tuition fee for the three-year BBA programme is INR 50,000 per year. BCA: The tuition fee for the three-year BCA programme is INR 50,000 per year. BCom: The tuition fee for the three-year BCom programme is INR 30,000 per year. BA: The tuition fee for the BA programme is INR 60,000. BEd: The tuition fee for the two-year BEd programme is INR 42,000. The mentioned fee is sourced from the official website of the university/ sanctioning body. It is still subject to change and hence, is indicative.
faqs.question: Q: How costly is studying at Nimbus Academy of Management?

Candidates who are interested in taking admission to any of the courses at Nimbus Academy of Management can register by filling out the online application form. Further, for BA and BCom, candidates are reuired to visit Samarth website to fill out the application form. Given below is a step-by-step process to fill Nimbus Academy of Management admission form 2025:Step 1: Visit the official website of Nimbus Academy of Management.Step 2: Click on the admission tab and click on the Apply online.Step 3: Fill out all the required in the enquiry form.Step 4: Step 4: After submitting the enquiry form, the admission cell contacted candidates for further assistance.

Nimbus Academy of Management admission process 2025 isentrance and counselling-based. The aspirants looking for admission are required to fill out the basic eligibility for admission and appear for the accepted entrance exam. Want to know complete details aboutNimbus Academy of Managementadmission process 2025,go through the following section.
Step 1: Nimbus Academy of Management Application Process 2025

Applicants looking forward to admission to UG and PG courses at Nimbus Academy of Management must fill up the enquiry form online by going through the official website of the college. Further, for BA and BCom, candidates are also required to apply on the Smarath website by visiting (https://sdsuv.samarth.ac.in/) to apply for admission.
Step 2: Nimbus Academy of Management Selection Round

According to the selection criteria, applicants need to apply for the counselling round conducted by the institute for UG courses and appear for entrance exams accepted by the institute such as CUET/CAT/MAT for admission to UG and MBA courses, respectively. Additionally, the applicants must pass Class 12 for admission to UG, and for admission to PG courses, applicants must have a graduation degree. The institute releases the shortlisted candidates’ list based on the entrance exam score.
Step 3: Final Seat Confirmation
To grab the final seat selected applicants are required to pay theNimbus Academy of Management feewithin the given deadline.

highlights.summary: The TANCET registration window is expected to open in Mar 2026 for Bharathiar School of Management and Entrepreneur Development (BSMED) admission to the MBA course.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Overview not available

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2018
reviews_list.review_title: Good Government university for MBA.

review_content.Placements: Many companies like Coke, Karvy, Bejobbed, and Visstar visited the college for placements. Few more companies are yet to visit in upcoming years. Good companies visited the college last year. Though many of the students do not show any interest in placements, the staff puts a lot of effort for placements.
review_content.Infrastructure: All the facilities are available at the university. Greenery surrounds the campus. Good environment and good climate. The classrooms are good and well-maintained. All the sports facilities are available. The students can participate in many competitions.

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2011
reviews_list.review_title: Review

review_content.Other: Faculty are of 2 extremes. Either extremely good or extremely bad. Coaching has a government institute type of approach. Amount of work, assignment and projects given to the students are not as intense as it should be in an MBA college. All types of students from various backgrounds come here hence one cannot expect a standard capability from all students. Placement network is not very strong. Again it is in extremes. 2-3 extremely good offers come every year giving great ROI. Course fee is excellent, under Rs. 20000 per semester for meritorious students. Branding of college name among Industry is very poor which makes it difficult for students to get an identity in the outside world of tier 1 and tier 2 MBA's. Infrastructure is average.

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: Low fees for regular MBA course, good infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: 40% of students got placements. The highest package offered is 4.2 lpa. The lowest package, 3.0 lpa. Icici bank, icici Prudential and securities. Esaf bank, kotak mahindra, tata aig, itc, gati, ttk services, VR careers are the top recruiters. Business executives sales executives roles were offered. The highest monthly package 35,000 the lowest monthly package 20000 was offered in our course. All did internship in the companies of own interests.
review_content.Infrastructure: Department has Wi-Fi availability. Good classrooms and library. Decent computer labs with internet facilities. Moderate quality of hostels and food facility can be still improved. Better medical facility. Lineage of hostel. Playgrounds are available in hostel.

reviews_list.review_title: The placements, infrastructure and the faculty of the college are good.

review_content.Placements: The placements are one of the best among the other colleges. The faculty will guide you to nail the interview stuff. Stay cool, and your professors will build a platform for you. Aptitude class holds good, and training is provided to the students depending on its need and requirements. Aptitude test will be conducted on a regular basis.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college is located in beautiful Valanadu hills. The labs are mind-blowing and are equipped with all the latest equipment that gives the practical knowledge to the students. The hostel facilities are good, and food sounds perfect. The medical facility like cab will be available for the hostelers to travel up to the hospital, in case of an emergency.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: The review of Infant Jesus College of Engineering.

content.Placements: The MBA graduates from our college got placed with a salary package of 2 LPA recently, and the college also put its efforts to train students for placements. They placed a lot of students in well-reputed companies earlier. They not only offer placement opportunities but also train the students to utilise such opportunities.
content.Infrastructure: The college has a robust infrastructure. Each department has its own building. All the departments have their own labs, and the classrooms available here are very spacious. All the labs are well-equipped, and we also have well-trained lab assistants. The college emphasises on lab sessions. As far as the sports are concerned, the college excels in the field of weight lifting as we have the gold medal winner in Commonwealth Games as its coach.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Aeronautical Engineering - Batch of 2014
individual_reviews.title: The placements, infrastructure and the faculty of the college are good.

content.Placements: The placements are one of the best among the other colleges. The faculty will guide you to nail the interview stuff. Stay cool, and your professors will build a platform for you. Aptitude class holds good, and training is provided to the students depending on its need and requirements. Aptitude test will be conducted on a regular basis.
content.Infrastructure: The college is located in beautiful Valanadu hills. The labs are mind-blowing and are equipped with all the latest equipment that gives the practical knowledge to the students. The hostel facilities are good, and food sounds perfect. The medical facility like cab will be available for the hostelers to travel up to the hospital, in case of an emergency.

hostel.description: Men's hostel can accommodate around 400 students and the women's hostel present intake is 300 students. Nutritious and quality vegetarian and non-vegetarian food, out-door and indoor games, recreational facilities, stationery store, phone facility and reading room facility are the various facilities provided to the hostelers.

library.description:
Digital Library with a collection of 32,000 volumes of books, 91 national and 68 international journals. Besides, the library has 300 bound volumes of previous journal volumes and a separate reading area. The Central library has special services like Reprography Service, IEEE Student Branch Library etc. The other services provided by the library include Lending, Reference service, Inter-Library Loan and Internet Browsing.
A separate Digital Knowledge Centre has been established in order to enable the users to browse the e-journals, e-learning materials and other digital library collections.

review_summary.college_name: Department of PG Studies Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Master of Computer Applications (MCA) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: This college and hostel have best view. It has Nandhi hills behind, and Channa Giri hills beside it.

content.Placements: Around 40% of students are placed, since there is only one on-campus showed up that is new to this college, students have to join with the off-campus a lot. But if they choose less fee structure other than other colleges near Bangalore. This college is the best.
content.Infrastructure: In MCA there are laboratories, Wi-Fi is available, R and D laboratories are there for internships training, and all. Classrooms are good, and there is a digital classroom nowadays. The quality of food is not good. But it is not delicious up to the mark. Sports are conducted.

individual_reviews.course: Discontinued (Mar 2022)- M.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: Good infrastructure, faculty and affordable fee.

content.Placements: Around 30% of students got placed after graduation. Another batch got placed through internship and others changed their job profile. Some as tech support, few to sales and marketing, remaining software developers and testers while rest went for higher studies. Placement ratio also average.
content.Infrastructure: All facilities are available. Infrastructure and facilities wise everything was as required. Average college with all the facilities available. The fees is also affordable.
content.Faculty: Half of the teachers were good. But overall it was fine and good. The course curriculum was relevant. No college makes students ready for industry mostly tier 2 level colleges. Value for money college with good education, sports, facilities, teachers, infrastructure and placements.

individual_reviews.course: Discontinued (Mar 2022)- MBA in Infrastructure Management - Batch of 2016
individual_reviews.title: Good placements in 2016, Qualified and experienced faculty members. They were well knowledgeable.

content.Placements: I completed my Post Graduation from visvesvaraya college in Bangalore. Placement percentage is very good as compared with other colleges.
content.Infrastructure: The college has a good infrastructure. I would rate 8.5 for infrastructure on a scale of 1-10. Labs are maintained clean and are equipped with sufficient instruments which are needed. The college has a huge library containing many books, we can find almost any book related to our subject here. The college campus has big grounds playing cricket, etc. It also a Basketball court. The quality of classrooms is also good. Food is awesome.

review_content.Placements: Jvims phase good placements offer for all students. I also get placement at the college. I placed at mazcon infotach, Ahmedabad. Even my friend also get good job offer. Placement officer in jvims is so helpful. They can help us bulid resume to get job.
review_content.Infrastructure: Jvims has good infrastructure for study. In jvims all class room has projector. They have good lab for practical with all the facilisis. Even all class room has all facilisis in bulit. In canteen they servers good and fresh food. Jvims phase good sport playground and room.

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2018
reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely satisfied with the wuality of education and the knowledge of the faculty members.

review_content.Placements: A very good placement opportunity for the current batch as well as seniors too. Reputed firms are used to visit our college for fresh recruitments. Banks, construction companies, brass part firms, food industries, automobile industry, etc. Are the main sector who come to our college for placements.
review_content.Infrastructure: Sufficient smart classroom as well as the huge ground for cultural events. A huge auditorium with sufficient space is used for indoor events like teachers day celebration, freshers party, farewell party and many. The infrastructure of JVIMS is like our second home.

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2018
reviews_list.review_title: I love this college mostly because of the faculty members.

review_content.Placements: Minimum INR15000 and maximum INR 20000 is the salary offered to students in similar coarse as I do. 45% of students got an internship from my course in companies such as parle agro, Reliance mall, D-Mart etc. Roles offered such as asst finance manager, asst project manager, department jr supervisor etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: Basic facilities such as spacious classrooms, fans, adequate lights are therein with a different space for drinking water and cleaned and hygienic restrooms as well as computer labs and libraries with appropriate books and adequate number of materials related to coarse were available and accessible.

individual_reviews.title: Overall, the college is very good.

content.Placements: The college provided very good placement opportunities for the current batch as well as the senior batch. Reputed firms visit our college for recruitments. Banks, construction companies, brass part firms, food industries, automobile industries, etc., are the main sectors that offer placements.
content.Infrastructure: The college has sufficient smart classrooms. A huge ground is present where cultural events are conducted. A huge auditorium is available, and it is spacious enough where events like teacher's day celebration, freshers party, farewell party and many other events are conducted. JVIMS is like our second home.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Computer Applications (MCA) - Batch of 2017
individual_reviews.title: It has best college to study.

content.Placements: Jvims phase good placements offer for all students. I also get placement at the college. I placed at mazcon infotach, Ahmedabad. Even my friend also get good job offer. Placement officer in jvims is so helpful. They can help us bulid resume to get job.
content.Infrastructure: Jvims has good infrastructure for study. In jvims all class room has projector. They have good lab for practical with all the facilisis. Even all class room has all facilisis in bulit. In canteen they servers good and fresh food. Jvims phase good sport playground and room.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied with the wuality of education and the knowledge of the faculty members.

content.Placements: A very good placement opportunity for the current batch as well as seniors too. Reputed firms are used to visit our college for fresh recruitments. Banks, construction companies, brass part firms, food industries, automobile industry, etc. Are the main sector who come to our college for placements.
content.Infrastructure: Sufficient smart classroom as well as the huge ground for cultural events. A huge auditorium with sufficient space is used for indoor events like teachers day celebration, freshers party, farewell party and many. The infrastructure of JVIMS is like our second home.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: I love this college mostly because of the faculty members.

content.Placements: Minimum INR15000 and maximum INR 20000 is the salary offered to students in similar coarse as I do. 45% of students got an internship from my course in companies such as parle agro, Reliance mall, D-Mart etc. Roles offered such as asst finance manager, asst project manager, department jr supervisor etc.
content.Infrastructure: Basic facilities such as spacious classrooms, fans, adequate lights are therein with a different space for drinking water and cleaned and hygienic restrooms as well as computer labs and libraries with appropriate books and adequate number of materials related to coarse were available and accessible.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Computer Applications (MCA) - Batch of 2015
individual_reviews.title: It is the best college to study.

content.Placements: Placements at JVIMS College are good. My friends and I got good placements. The placement officer is also good and they help us in every step of getting a job like building a resume and getting a dream job. They always help us.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of this college is good. They have a smart classroom, library, clean washrooms, a gym, sports room, cricket ground, baseball ground, water, auditorium, parking, canteen, playground, laddies room, and lab. We have all the facilities and a good colleges phase.

highlights.summary: A few more updates are given below:

placements.overview: In Shree Venkateshwara Hi-Tech Engineering College, 276 students admitted in year 2015-16, out of which 127 graduated in 2018-19. From this, 125 qualified students got placed with a median salary of Rs.144000 and 2 students got selected for higher studies. In year 2016-17, 265 students were admitted, out of which 34 graduated in 2019-20. From this, 34 qualified students got placed with a median salary of Rs.150000. In year 2017-18, 184 students were admitted, out of which 197 graduated in 2020-21. From this, 197 qualified students got placed with a median salary of Rs.180000.

Candidates can choose Full Time courses, from streams like Engineering and Business & Management Studies. College offers B.E. / B.Tech courses at the UG level. While, at the PG level, the college offers available programmes like M.E./M.Tech and MBA/PGDM. The Shree Venkateshwara Hi-Tech Engineering College course fee ranges between INR 35,000 to 2,00,000.

faqs.answer: A:    The overall seats available across all courses offered by Shree Venkateshwara Hi-Tech Engineering College is up to 474. Good thing to know is that Shree Venkateshwara Hi-Tech Engineering College has courses which are approved by prominent Government bodies like AICTE.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Cyber Security) - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Good in placements but not for enjoyment.

review_content.Placements: 82% of students were placed in the course The lowest salary package was 2.5 lacs per annum and the highest salary package was 12 lacs per annum. TCS, Mahindra, Zoho, etc. are the top recruiters. Internship is not conducted for my batch. Cybercrime, black-hat hacking, white-hat hacking, etc. are the top roles offered.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college campus is well and good . College was surrounded by trees. The college has computer labs, library and other department-oriented labs for students. Hostel is also good but the food given in hostel mess is not good; sometimes it's worse than we think.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2019
reviews_list.review_title: Review of Shree Venkateshwara Hi-Tech Engineering College.

review_content.Placements: I completed my engineering course with an aggregate of 70%, without any backlogs. I got campus placement in Metalman Private Limited with a salary of Rs. 13,000 per month. About 52 companies visited our college for placements. The college provides better facilities for students. They will provide the competent task in projects which is conducted in 3rd year and 4th year, which will give us more idea to think widely and innovative design. It also gives us the confidence to work hard.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college has three blocks in which one block has facilities like an administrative office, principal office, placement cell, exam centre, office, meeting hall, auditorium, etc. In other block, there are classrooms of various departments sectioned as 3 floors. In the last blocks there are laboratory, machine and engine labs.

faqs.answer: Shree Venkateshwara Hi-Tech Engineering College has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidate must have passed VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. from schools situated in Tamil Nadu. Tamil Nadu native candidate who have passed any of the VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. or their equivalent exam from schools situated outside Tamil Nadu can also apply. They should produce Original Nativity Certificate. Children of Central Government Employees, irrespective of their nativity, provided their parents or guardians (only if both parents are not alive) have been serving in Tamil Nadu continuously for the past five years can be eligible to apply. Sons & daughters of All India service Tamil Nadu cadre officers are eligible to apply. A Self declaration from the parent in this regard is to be produced. Children of employees in the Public Sector or Government recognised institutions had been working in their organisations for the past five years are also eligible, irrespective of their domicile. Other State candidates who have studied VIII, IX, X, XI and XII Std. in Tamil Nadu are eligible to apply.MBA/PGDMCandidate who have completed 10+2+AMIE or 10+3 years Diploma + AMIE are also eligible. AMIE candidate must have 2 years regular full time experience in the relevant field.M.E./M.TechCandidate who have completed 10+2+AMIE or 10+3 years Diploma + AMIE are also eligible. AMIE candidate must have 2 years regular full time experience in the relevant field.

review_content.Infrastructure: The facilities of the college are wonderful; they provide everything required for the students, such as good air-conditioned classrooms, free 24*7 Wi-Fi, computer labs, a large library with numerous books and online e-journals, etc. The college hostel is very spacious, offering separate and shared rooms. They maintain the hostel through regular cleaning. The food quality provided by the college is delicious, and its quality is also excellent. The college has one canteen. Medical facilities are provided by the college once a week. There is a very large playground in the college where students play various games like cricket, football, volleyball, basketball, etc.

reviews_list.batch_info: Post Graduate Diploma in Management - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: Review of Xavier Institute of Development Action and Studies.

review_content.Placements: About 80% of students were placed in reputed MNCs like Byju's and Collabra. The college had a great placement cell. Students got internships in top institutes.
review_content.Infrastructure: It had a great hostel and mess facility. The food was very tasty. It had well-equipped labs, Wi-Fi, classrooms, a library, and a gym. It conducted various tournaments from time to time. It also had medical facilities.
review_content.Faculty: Teachers were well-educated and knowledgeable. They were strict and helpful. Strict rules for academic assignments were followed. Doubts were solved and revisions were also done for semester exams. Exams were tough.

reviews_list.batch_info: Post Graduate Diploma in Management - Batch of 2018
reviews_list.review_title: In simple and sweat word the college which gives you real life experience.

review_content.Placements: Our and senior batch placement was good. All the Alumni working in good organisation. Our 98% students got the placement. The highest salary offered is 7.00 Lacs and Minimum was 3.5 Lacs. Lot of companies visited our campus like Goderj, Capital Trust, Money Tree, Techolotion. All the students got the ellegent work position.
review_content.Infrastructure: With all the facilities and nature friendly environment. All the facilities related to sports and Gym in campus. Timely game activities within campus or inter college activities. The campus which feel like staying in the foreign country. The campus within Church.

content.Placements: Mostly, each and every student in the PGDM program gets placed every year. The highest package is about 12 LPA, and the lowest package is about 4 LPA offered in the PGDM course at this college. Top recruiting companies in our college, such as banks, CASA, JSLPS, BSLPS, Deloitte, etc., visit the college every year. Each candidate gets selected by different companies for their internships according to their capabilities and skills. The top roles offered in the PGDM course include those of accountants, managers, sales managers, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities of the college are wonderful; they provide everything required for the students, such as good air-conditioned classrooms, free 24*7 Wi-Fi, computer labs, a large library with numerous books and online e-journals, etc. The college hostel is very spacious, offering separate and shared rooms. They maintain the hostel through regular cleaning. The food quality provided by the college is delicious, and its quality is also excellent. The college has one canteen. Medical facilities are provided by the college once a week. There is a very large playground in the college where students play various games like cricket, football, volleyball, basketball, etc.

individual_reviews.course: Post Graduate Diploma in Management - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Review of Xavier Institute of Development Action and Studies.

content.Placements: About 80% of students were placed in reputed MNCs like Byju's and Collabra. The college had a great placement cell. Students got internships in top institutes.
content.Infrastructure: It had a great hostel and mess facility. The food was very tasty. It had well-equipped labs, Wi-Fi, classrooms, a library, and a gym. It conducted various tournaments from time to time. It also had medical facilities.
content.Faculty: Teachers were well-educated and knowledgeable. They were strict and helpful. Strict rules for academic assignments were followed. Doubts were solved and revisions were also done for semester exams. Exams were tough.

individual_reviews.course: Post Graduate Diploma in Management - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: In simple and sweat word the college which gives you real life experience.

content.Placements: Our and senior batch placement was good. All the Alumni working in good organisation. Our 98% students got the placement. The highest salary offered is 7.00 Lacs and Minimum was 3.5 Lacs. Lot of companies visited our campus like Goderj, Capital Trust, Money Tree, Techolotion. All the students got the ellegent work position.
content.Infrastructure: With all the facilities and nature friendly environment. All the facilities related to sports and Gym in campus. Timely game activities within campus or inter college activities. The campus which feel like staying in the foreign country. The campus within Church.

individual_reviews.course: Post Graduate Diploma in Management - Batch of 2013

content.Other: The college has best infrastructure in our city large campus building labs playground etc. Everything which is must in Management College. The staff of college is well educated and experienced so this is so useful for us. Fees is good and very flexible for average students. I love the life, when I was there. Only disappointment is the placements. Few companies are there and selected only 30 out of 400. Overall, the college is good for students, who actually want to study well.

reviews_list.batch_info: Post Graduate Diploma in Management - Batch of 2019
reviews_list.review_title: Satisfied with the faculty, infrastructure, and good placements

review_content.Placements: The placements are good. Super dream companies and dream companies gather for placements. 70% students are placed in the third sem (2nd year). Human resource, finance analyst, CRM are the roles offered. Everyone got an internship from our college. Stipend: Rs. 22000- highest. Rs. 7000- lowest. Rs. 12000- average.
review_content.Infrastructure: We have a good infrastructure. We have classrooms that are well furnished, smart board classrooms. Library with central AC and a vast collection of books. Food in the canteen is superb and the maintenance is good. We have the good medical facilities in college. First aid kits are there. When it comes to sports, every sport is encouraged. We have indoor games also. They conduct games every six months.

reviews_list.batch_info: Post Graduate Diploma in Management - Batch of 2018
reviews_list.review_title: Good placements, faculty and curriculum.

review_content.Placements: Placements are good in the sense that they provide good internships from which we can get industry exposure. 95% placement for the senior batch. The highest package is 10 lakhs whereas the lowest is 4.8 lakhs. The average package is around 5 lakhs. As it is a reputed B-school, all 1st level and 2nd level companies come for placements. Marketing is the primary specialisation and in the 2nd year, you can opt for either finance or HR.
review_content.Infrastructure: Jain College is famous for its infrastructure. We are having good Wi-Fi facility, along with computer labs. The library is one the best tools for a student to have knowledge about a subject and each and every book of each subject is there to help us. The classrooms are well equipped with a projector and white board.

If students need information any point of time, they are always there. The course curriculum is vast and provides in-depth knowledge of every aspect of the subject. They not only focus on the pen and paper material but also the overall growth of the students right from the mock interview until the personal or technical process. It was a wonderful journey.

individual_reviews.title: The life that could be if you choose MIME.

content.Placements: The placements are fairly good. It was a breeze getting through the placements. The placement coordinators are helpful. The companies that are come for placement are also good. 130+ companies come every year including the Big 5. The faculty will train you as well.

The Wi-Fi works great when it decides to work. There is no food place inside the college and if you want anything non veg you have to go outside.

admission_process.title: IIEMR Jaipur Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Indian Institute of Event Management Research - IIEMR admissions are merit-based. The college offers courses atUG, PG and Diplomalevels. Additionally, courses here are available in multiple streams, such asEvent Management,PRetc. Candidates can apply online on the official website of theIndian Institute of Event Management Research - IIEMR. More details about theIIEMR Jaipur admission 2025 are elaborated in the article below.
IIEMR Jaipur admissions are based on merit of the last qualifying exam of Class 12/ graduation. Given below are the IIEMR Jaipur course admission details for eligibility and selection details:
Know more aboutIIEMR Jaipur courses

Indian Institute of Event Management Research - IIEMR admission process consists of multiple steps. The admission criteria is completely merit-based. For Diploma and degree courses, candidates need to go through a five-step admission process. The elaborated steps around the Indian Institute of Event Management Research admissions are given below:
Step 1: Check the eligibility Criteria

To begin with the IIEMR admissions, candidates need to fulfil the basic eligibility criteria for all the UG, PG and Diploma level courses as per the minimum educational requirements set by the college.
Step 2: Fill the IIEMR Application Form

In the next step, eligible candidates can fill out the application form in online/ offline mode. For online application, candidates can visit the college's official website and apply for the course of their choice.
Step 3: Selection Rounds

Admission to all the courses at the Indian Institute of Event Management Research is merit-based. Students are offered merit-based admission to courses offered at UG, PG and Diploma level. For UG degree and Diploma courses, students must pass Class 12. However, for PG degree and Diploma programmes, passing graduation is must.
Step 4: Shortlisting of Candidates
After fulfilling all the basic eligibility requirements of the admission criteria, students must also appear for a PI round for the final selection.
Step 5: Fee Payment & Seat Confirmation
At last, the selected candidates must pay theIIEMR course feeto their respective programmes.

fee_structure.overview: The registration deadline for AP EAPCET 2026 (without a late fee) has been extended to Mar 17, 2026, for Malineni Lakshmaiah Womens Engineering College admission to BTech and BPharma courses. The BTech exams are scheduled for May 12 to May 15, and on May 18, 2026, followed by the BPharma exam on May 19 and May 20, 2026.

faqs.answer: Malineni Lakshmaiah Womens Engineering College has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidates who have passed Diploma in Engineering or any other examination recognised as equivalent there to, from a recognised Institute/ University, Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana are also eligible. Candidates who have appeared in Diploma in Engineering and who are awaiting their results can also apply on provisional basis. Candidates should belong to the state of Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana. Candidate should have completed 16 years of age as of 31st December of the year of admission (2023). There is no upper age limit.M.E./M.TechCandidate must have passsed B.E./B.Tech. in relevant stream and obtained at least 50% marks (45% in case of reserved category candidates) from an AICTE/UGC approved institution recognised by the Government of Andhra Pradesh as equivalent thereto. Final year appearing students may also apply on provisional basis.MBA/PGDMCandidate must have completed Bachelor degree of 3/4 years duration with above mentioned marks from any recognised University/Institute. 45% marks for BC categories. Candidate who are appearing for the final year degree examination are also be eligible. Degree obtained by Distance Mode Program should have recognition by Joint Committee of UGC, AICTE and DEC/DEB. Candidate who passed all the subjects of the three years of any Degree course in one sitting is not eligible for admission.

reviews.review_heading: About our college for women in Guntur.

college_info.college_name: Jagadguru Rambhadracharya Handicapped University - JRHU

highlights.summary:
Jagadguru Rambhadracharya Divyanga University (JRDU) was founded in 2001 by Jagadguru Rambhadracharya and is run by the Jagadguru Rambhadracharya Viklang Shikshan Sansthan Trust. It is a government-aided University and is located in Chitrakoot, Uttar Pradesh. The University offers 26 courses under eight faculties such as Humanities, Social Sciences, Computer & Information Sciences, Music, Fine Arts, Education, Commerce & Management and Vocational Studies. The University is approved by the University Grants Commission (UGC), The National Assessment & Accreditation Council (NAAC) and Association of Indian Universities (AIU).

Jagadguru Rambhadracharya Divyanga University is the only university, exclusively for the disabled across the globe. To ensure greater participation of disabled students in higher and professional education, the University offers disabled-friendly campus, courses and classrooms with traditional and modern knowledge. It focuses on the overall development of the students by providing both theoretical as well as practical knowledge. Keeping in mind the special needs of the differently enabled students, the University encourages sports activities as well.

The major highlights of Jagadguru Rambhadracharya Divyanga University are tabulated below:

Jagadguru Rambhadracharya Divyanga University admission process is conducted offline. Interested candidates can get the application form either from the University campus or can download it from the official website of the University. Students are required to send the filled-in form with a demand draft of Rs 500 (for B.Ed and MEd) and Rs 200 (for remaining courses) drawn in favour of “Finance Officer, JR Divyanga University” payable at Chitrakoot. The details regarding Jagadguru Rambhadracharya Divyanga University admission is listed below:

Read more: Jagadguru Rambhadracharya Divyanga University Admission Process

The courses at Jagadguru Rambhadracharya Divyanga University are offered under its 16 departments, including Department of Computer, Department of Sanskrit, Department of Commerce & Management, Department of Sociology, Department of Vocational Education, etc. The duration varies from course to course. Below-mentioned is the list of Jagadguru Rambhadracharya Divyanga University courses offered at UG, PG, and diploma level:

The details regarding some of the flagship courses of Jagadguru Rambhadracharya Divyanga University are tabulated below:

Read more: Jagadguru Rambhadracharya Divyanga University Courses and Fees

Jagadguru Rambhadracharya Divyanga University has a guidance and placement centre which assists the students in selecting the courses and also facilitates jobs opportunities with the right blend of academic and personal skills. The cell performs a few main tasks such as conducting training sessions, providing placement opportunities for educated disabled graduates in both public and private sector, monitoring the implementation of all the policies pertaining to higher education of disabled students and creating awareness regarding the educational needs for the people with disabilities.

Read more: Jagadguru Rambhadracharya Divyanga University Placements

Candidates in the humanities can apply for positions in the government sector, such as banking firms, government ministries, legal firms, and political analysts.Content Writer, Civil Services, Human Resource Manager, Defense Services, Lawyer, Journalist, Counsellor, and Therapist positions are available. overview_faqs.question: What is the scope of MBA?
overview_faqs.answer: The scope of MBA course is increasing day by day. MBA is one of the big job oriented professional programme and the most one which has been sought by the students. Once you have completed your degree, you have a great job opportunity in the industrial world. You may the manager or executive in term of designation.The management term is most suited to the managers and that's why it is the way, where you can reach on the top of the height as soon as possible by using your leadership and working proficiency. An MBA professional always plays a vital role in his/her company and this is why he used to keep in touch with the board of directors. No need to specify the companies who recruit the MBA professionals. All sectors including government and public have various industries, companies, institutions or related organizations, come in the job prospective fields for an MBA professional.Some job profiles are listed here:Brand ManagerAccount ManagerInternational Business ManagerMarketing Execut

overview_faqs.question: How much salary does an Engineer get?
overview_faqs.answer: Many companies offer great salary packages in metro cities which are hub for IT companies as well as other reputed MNCs. The salary also differs as per the entry level. After gaining experience of 2-5 years, you can expect a salary of 8-12 LPA and then shift from technical to managerial roles.Know more about -Engineering Career

content.Placements: 25% of students have placed in different companies minimum package 3.5l and the highest package 7.5L and 35% of students have got internship my course is very bright future making course nowadays people suffering from stress anxiety and pandemic has also changed our life my subject is psychology that helps people to reduce stress and lot more.

admission_process.title: Jagadguru Rambhadracharya Handicapped University - JRHU Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Jagadguru Rambhadracharya Handicapped University - JRHU admissions are based on merit. The institute considers applications of candidates meeting the eligibility criteria.Jagadguru Rambhadracharya Handicapped University - JRHUoffers courses at UG and PG levels. Some of the courses include B.Sc., B.Ed, M.A. and M.Ed. Candidates can apply online for the preferred course.
The total tuition fees for UG courses isINR 3,000 - 50,000. Aspirants may also need to pay one-time caution deposit at the time of admission.
The institute offers UG courses for 6 months - 2 years. PG courses are offered for 1 year - 2 years.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: It is a perfect management college.

content.Placements: The college has tie-up with some goods companies for college placements. Every year many students get placed according to their performance and experience. Our top recruiting companies are HCL, Amul, Just dial, etc. I am a BBA student, and this course offers many opportunities like becoming a manager, lawyer, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is good and huge with greenery all around. The entire campus is Wi-Fi enabled, and the whole campus is covered with CCTV. There are separate hostels for girls and boys. We have a huge library with a good collection of books and a seminar hall. The college has huge grounds for sports and other functions.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: Hostel is also separate for boys and girls. It is fully secured with CCTV.

content.Placements: Placement of our college was good. 50-60% of students were placed in many recruitment companies. The highest package of our course is 6-7 Lacs and average package is 2-3 Lacs. Top recruiting companies are HCL, Amul, etc. There is no internship.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is very good and big. There are Wi-Fi for students. Hostel is also separate for boys and girls and fully secured with CCTV. One big library and computer lab is there which is very helpful for students. Mess food quality was also good. A big ground for sports and activities.

individual_reviews.title: Review of Dayal Group of Institution.

content.Placements: Almost 40-50% of the students get placed in our course. Placements in our college are not so good, but if you are good in study and give your best, then you can get placed in the best companies. Top recruiting companies for our course are HCL, Amul, etc. We can't get any internship from campus.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has good infrastructure and facilities. There are huge library and computer lab. Wi-Fi is also available, and the entire campus is fully secured with CCTV cameras, even in classrooms. There is one mess in which serves good quality of food to students. Games and sports are also is very important. We have three grounds for sports such as cricket, volleyball, lawn tennis, etc.

content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is good and big also. There is Wi-Fi for students. Big library is there and a separate computer lab. individual_reviews.title: Good college but not best .

Classrooms are big but sometime not clean. In mess food quality is good and medical facility is also there. In our college there is three big grounds for sport where we play cricket, football, volleyball, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Facilities provided by the college are not good.
reviews.review_text: Facilities provided by the college are not so good, and recently they added a generator. In the library, there are not enough books for students. Quality of food served in the mess and canteen is good. Sports and games are not good here.

reviews.review_heading: Dayal group of institutions is a hub of studies with numerous career opportunities.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is best I would say. Spacious classrooms, huge computer lab and seminar hall. Wi-Fi enabled campus as well. Still, miss the canteen and mess. Greenery all around and serene environment all over gives a sense of peace to the soul with the studies. Audio visual rooms are available for presentations etc. The library has the huge collection of books and journals on various genre and subjects.

reviews.review_heading: The whole campus was fully secured with CCTV cameras.

Wi-Fi is available for students and the whole campus was fully secured with CCTV cameras. The hostel is available for both boys and girls separately and the quality of food in the mess are also good.

reviews.review_heading: Fully satisfied with Teachers and education.
reviews.review_text: Every faculty is designed beautifully and the labs are with high technology, which means the Dayal Bagh ICUS system is followed and also the medical facility is best in comparison to another college. I think this is one which has modern as well as the old type of infrastructure is follow and sports is a beautiful event held every month.

reviews.review_heading: On average satisfied. Good placement and opportunities for those who truly seek a job.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure over here is comparatively average over here. Quality of the food in canteen is above average. I have not faced any infrastructure related issues during my own tenure at the college. In this college there is more emphasis towards sports.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Mahaveer Institute of Technology offers various programmes at UG and PG levels. Students can choose Full Time courses from plethora of streams such as Engineering and Business & Management Studies. At the UG level, students can choose from courses, namely B.E. / B.Tech. On the other hand, at the PG level, the Mahaveer Institute of Technology offers MBA/PGDM. The fees for Mahaveer Institute of Technology courses range between INR 1,00,800 to 2,44,800.

reviews_list.batch_info: Diploma in Electronic Engineering - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: Please choose a better option.

review_content.Placements: There were no placement companies that came for placements in my year. The placement rate was 0% because no companies visited. Students had to find placements on their own, using their own resources. Recruitment companies only started coming after several years, and the companies were not leading brands in it.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities here were not so good. Classrooms were below average and had not been updated over time. There were no hostels available for students, so they had to search for rental places to live. In the canteen, only three or four drinks were available. There was only one snack available.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2018
reviews_list.review_title: Somewhat dissatisfied because of some faculty and management.

review_content.Placements: Placements are going well when compared to last years this year we are lucky because college is giving their best support in placements. Not only the software side but also from the mechanical side we are getting placements from different companies. Management is giving placement training also.
review_content.Infrastructure: The campus contains three blocks each block has four floors and one big library too. In the main block, there are software people and in the next block mechanical and civil students are there. And labs are separate for every branch and they are good and large enough.

overview_faqs.answer: The scope of MBA course is increasing day by day. MBA is one of the big job oriented professional programme and the most one which has been sought by the students. Once you have completed your degree, you have a great job opportunity in the industrial world. You may the manager or executive in term of designation.The management term is most suited to the managers and that's why it is the way, where you can reach on the top of the height as soon as possible by using your leadership and working proficiency. An MBA professional always plays a vital role in his/her company and this is why he used to keep in touch with the board of directors. No need to specify the companies who recruit the MBA professionals.
