overview_faqs.question: What do Electrical Engineering professionals do?
overview_faqs.answer: Electrical Engineering professionals are engineering jack of all trades, as they make use of their knowledge of Physics and Mathematics along with computer programming skills to develop intricate circuit systems. These circuit boards run electrical signals to and from electrical components to accomplish everything from a mundane computer startup to controlling absolute power and precision of a rocket going out of earth's atmosphere.Know more about -Electrical Engineering Courses

review_summary.college_name: Mahaveer Institute of Technology Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2017
individual_reviews.title: College is good, infrastructure is good but only a few placements in the college

content.Placements: Only a few placements. In some academic years, we have no placements. External drives will be conducted each and every year. The college management sends us to other colleges for drives. If any placements are available, they will mail us. Average companies offering 4 lacs per anum will be offering placements.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is superb. We have a good and clean classroom with cameras fixed at every corner. All the labs have good equipment. There is a good playground with a good library and the college contains a good security system. The labs also contain new and fully featured equipment. The entire college is fireproof. It is provided with drinking water facilities.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Electronic Engineering - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Please choose a better option.

content.Placements: There were no placement companies that came for placements in my year. The placement rate was 0% because no companies visited. Students had to find placements on their own, using their own resources. Recruitment companies only started coming after several years, and the companies were not leading brands in it.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities here were not so good. Classrooms were below average and had not been updated over time. There were no hostels available for students, so they had to search for rental places to live. In the canteen, only three or four drinks were available. There was only one snack available.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: Somewhat dissatisfied because of some faculty and management.

content.Placements: Placements are going well when compared to last years this year we are lucky because college is giving their best support in placements. Not only the software side but also from the mechanical side we are getting placements from different companies. Management is giving placement training also.
content.Infrastructure: The campus contains three blocks each block has four floors and one big library too. In the main block, there are software people and in the next block mechanical and civil students are there. And labs are separate for every branch and they are good and large enough.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2015
individual_reviews.title: A good college with bad management.

content.Placements: Good in placements, teaching is so efficient and the management was better. Not good in fees, but the sources are very good, in college they don't allow mobile phones and the management was very strict in such things like mobile and ragging.
content.Infrastructure: Good infrastructure, have a library and medical facility and also we have sports and games, food is very good and the canteen was dirty, classrooms are good but the labs have very old equipment, and we are suffering with the smell of the college.

reviews_list.review_title: This college is a good option for engineering students with supportive and decent placements.

review_content.Placements: Placements are above average, and 90 percent of the students are placed in my course. The highest package offered is 6 to 7 LPA and the lowest package offered is 3 LPA. 80 percent of the students are placed in internships for my course, including Infosys and L&T companies.
review_content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure are good in our college, and the placement training is excellent for us. review_summary.college_name: New Prince Shri Bhavani College of Engineering and Technology Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Our college facility is awesome, with a practical explanation.

content.Placements: 90 percent of students were placed in my course. Minimum 8 LPA and Maximum 28 LPA were the packages offered for us. Hexaware, SOTI, and Pegatron were the top recruiting companies. 90 percent of students got internships at Pegatron. VLSI engineer and embedded engineer were the roles offered.
content.Infrastructure: Very nice teaching and supporting infrastructure. Good quality of food, all sports and games, and good medical facilities. Had all types of playgrounds and immediate medical facilities also. Also, arranged a big canteen for students to enjoy their break time.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Artificial Intelligence and Data Science - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: The college offers good teaching, active campus life, and growing opportunities in AI & DS.

content.Placements: In the AI & DS department, no students are placed yet because we are the first batch in our college. Placements are still ongoing. Overall, the college placement percentage is around 50–80%. The highest package offered is about 20 LPA, and the lowest package is 4 LPA. Companies like TCS, Cognizant, Avasoft, and Hexaware visit the college for placements. Students also try for internships through college support and outside companies. The top roles offered are Data Analyst, AI Engineer, App Developer, Full Stack Developer, Data Scientist, UI/UX Designer, and Software Developer.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: This college is a good option for engineering students with supportive and decent placements.

content.Placements: Placements are above average, and 90 percent of the students are placed in my course. The highest package offered is 6 to 7 LPA and the lowest package offered is 3 LPA. 80 percent of the students are placed in internships for my course, including Infosys and L&T companies.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure are good in our college, and the placement training is excellent for us. There are many facilities in our college, like labs, Wi-Fi, and a library. The library hour is useful to get new information for us. Sports and many events will be conducted in our colleges.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Excellent coaching with good infrastructure and a peaceful environment.

content.Placements: New price Shri Bhavnai College of Engineering and Technology has good placements, with around 90-95% of students placed. The highest package is about 10 LPA, with an average of 3-4 LPA. Many students get internships in IT and core companies, with roles like software developer, tester, and engineering positions.
content.Infrastructure: We have a well-stocked library here, and we are getting a library period once a week to gain more knowledge. We are also allowed to take library books home with proper registration. Classrooms have smart boards through which presentations are done by the staff members for a better skill environment.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: The college infrastructure is simple and good. The college is improving day by day in everything.

content.Placements: The college provides a good placement cell and places the students in reputed companies like Zoho, Infosys, and TCS. Many companies visit the campus, and students get job opportunities and internships. The placement department is helpful for the students' career growth.
content.Infrastructure: The college provides good facilities like clean classrooms, laboratories, and a library. The playground is clean and well-maintained. Students can play any games, and equipment is available. The college mess provides a hygienic and clean environment. The menu is simple, and the taste is good.

placement_data.title: NPSBCET Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: The 2025 placement session is ongoing. So far, over 200 students have been placed . The highest package offered as of now is INR 20 LPA and the average package stood at INR 8 LPA . The NPSBCET placement percentage for 2025 stands at 88% . The list of recruiters that participated in New Prince Shri Bhavani College of Engineering and Technology placements 2025 included TCS, Wipro, Infosys, Cognizant, HCL Technologies Ltd, Hexaware Technologies and many others.

The course-wise placement data has also been released. During placements 2025, 88% of BTech students have been placed. The median salary for BTech stands at INR 20 LPA . A total of 215 BTech students gratuated in 2025 and out of these 2 opted for higher studies. Furthermore, the average salary offered to PG 2-year courses including MBA , MCA , MTech was INR 15 LPA .

faqs.question: Does New Prince Shri Bhavani College of Engineering and Technology provide good placement facilities?
faqs.answer: New Prince Shri Bhavani College of Engineering and Technology has been rated 2.6 on placements on the basis of 5 reviews done by students. In New Prince Shri Bhavani College of Engineering and Technology, 105 students were admitted in year 2015-16, out of which 56 graduated in 2018-19. From this, 51 qualified students got placed with a median salary of INR 180000 and 5 students got selected for higher studies. In year 2016-17, 183 students were admitted, out of which 47 graduated in 2019-20. From this, 43 qualified students got placed with a median salary of INR 230000 and 3 students got selected for higher studies. In New Prince Shri Bhavani College of Engineering and Technology, 241 students were admitted in year 2017-18, out of which 176 graduated in 2020-21. From this, 104 qualified students got placed with a median salary of INR 199000 and 3 students got selected for higher studies.

reviews.review_text: Our classrooms are well-maintained and comfortable for learning. The campus provides free Wi-Fi for students. Department has labs and a library. They are useful for studies and practical learning. The hostel infrastructure is good and well-maintained. The food in the mess and canteen is average. But new canteens are scheduled to open in February 2026, which are expected to be better. Medical facilities are available on campus. The college supports sports and games such as cricket, basketball, kh...

reviews.review_heading: This college is a good option for engineering students with supportive and decent placements.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure are good in our college, and the placement training is excellent for us. There are many facilities in our college, like labs, Wi-Fi, and a library. The library hour is useful to get new information for us. Sports and many events will be conducted in our colleges.

reviews.review_heading: Excellent coaching with good infrastructure and a peaceful environment.
reviews.review_text: We have a well-stocked library here, and we are getting a library period once a week to gain more knowledge. We are also allowed to take library books home with proper registration. Classrooms have smart boards through which presentations are done by the staff members for a better skill environment.

reviews.review_heading: The college infrastructure is simple and good. The college is improving day by day in everything.
reviews.review_text: The college provides good facilities like clean classrooms, laboratories, and a library. The playground is clean and well-maintained. Students can play any games, and equipment is available. The college mess provides a hygienic and clean environment. The menu is simple, and the taste is good.

reviews.review_heading: I have a great college life and good placement.
reviews.review_text: There are well-maintained machines and proper lab facilities. The project room is very clean and neat. The classrooms are eco-friendly and have facilities like a library, canteen, sports room, gym, etc. The hostel food is very hygienic and clean. The canteen has delicious and hygienic food, and they provide RO-purified drinking water.

reviews.review_heading: The academics are strong here, making it good for career growth.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are hygienic and clean with a green environment. Labs are well-maintained. The college has modern, unique infrastructure. A disciplined library is available, along with friendly staff members. Physical education is also very good compared to academics.

reviews.review_heading: The platform to learn and grow.
reviews.review_text: Our college has spacious classrooms, well-equipped labs, and playgrounds. I am a day scholar who comes by college bus. It will pick and drop on time. The quality of the food in the canteen is good. Sports activities conducted are excellent.

reviews.review_heading: There is a good environment to improve our careers.
reviews.review_text: Good and safe transport facilities are provided for day scholars. Laboratories are fully equipped for practical Learning. Classrooms and campus infrastructure are well-maintained. The college atmosphere is located in full of nature. It feels very comfortable to learn.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the study environment.
reviews.review_text: Students can choose courses based on their interests, like B.E., B.Tech., MCA, and MBA in our college. It provides good infrastructure and facilities like labs, library, transport, sports, and hostel, which help in both studies and everyday life. The library can be accessible for our convenience.

reviews.review_heading: Faculty members are PhD holders.
reviews.review_text: All labs have Wi-Fi facilities in high TBPS and modernised lab equipment. It has smart classes, and video lectures are held weekly for 3 days. Foreign authors' and standard author books are available. Hostel rooms are highly neat and clean with ventilated rooms and a green garden. Restrooms are cleaned twice a day by sweepers. Separate garbage collectors are available in the room. Vegetarian and non-vegetarian menus are provided on a daily basis in a hygienic manner.

reviews.review_heading: A good college with decent placements and friendly faculty members.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is neatly maintained. It ensures the safety of all the hostellers. The mess and canteen food are decent. Basic medical support is provided by the college. In case of emergencies, the hospitals are at a safe distance for students to access.

reviews.review_heading: Good placements, helpful faculty, and active campus life.
reviews.review_text: New Price Shri Bhavani College has Wi-Fi, well-equipped labs, smart classrooms, and a good library. Hostels are clean and ventilated, with a mess/canteen serving veg and non-veg food. Medical facilities are available on campus, and sports grounds support physical activities. Overall, facilities are good and supportive for academics and campus life.

reviews.review_heading: The best college to shape our careers.
reviews.review_text: Despite me being a day scholar, I have heard from my friends that the hostel provides excellent food and a variety of menus. Free Wi-Fi is provided all around the hostel as well as the campus. No one is permitted outside the hostel without a proper GATE pass, and I would highly recommend this college for the safety.

reviews.review_heading: AIDS here is the best career choice I have made.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure here is awesome, and we enjoy the resources provided by our college. We are given free Wi-Fi all around the campus. I'm very satisfied with choosing the course and college. We are given sports hour every week, and our sports faculty assists us in games. We have separate sports facilities for both girls and boys.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: Satisfied with the faculty and good placements.

content.Placements: Above 60% of students got placed through placements. The highest package was 2 LPA. Top companies such as Wipro and TCS recruited at my college. 80% of students got internships in my course while I was studying.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college was fully natural and safe, and no one was allowed to enter the campus. Classrooms were very nice and comfortable, and smart classrooms were also available. The hostel also had many facilities, including a Wi-Fi connection, good-quality food, and strong safety measures.

admission_process.title: Rabiammal Ahamed Maideen College For Women Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Rabiammal Ahamed Maideen College For Women admission process is both merit and entrance-based, depending on the course. It offers courses at the UG and PG levels. Candidates who are selected for admission must pay the course fee to secure their seat.
The application process is conducted online. Candidates must contact the admission office for more details.

placement_report.college_name: Rabiammal Ahamed Maideen College For Women Placement & Salary Insights

placement_data.title: Rabiammal Ahamed Maideen College For Women Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: Rabiammal Ahamed Maideen College For Women has not released the 2024 placement statistics. However, the NIRF report 2024 has been released. As per the report, 7 UG (3-year) and 15 MBA students were placed during the 2023 placements. Further, the median package offered to UG (3-year) and MBA students during Rabiammal Ahamed Maideen College For Women placements 2023 stood at INR 84,000 per annum and INR 1.68 LPA , respectively.

tables.context: What is the placement scenario at Rabiammal Ahamed

faqs.question: What is the placement scenario at Rabiammal Ahamed Maideen College for Women?
faqs.answer: The college released the NIRF report 2024 incorporating the 2023 placement details. As per the report, 7 out of 385 UG (3-year) students were placed and 15 out of 72 MBA students were placed. Check the complete insights of Rabiammal Ahamed Maideen College For Women placements 2023 from the table below: Particulars Placement Statistics (2023) Total students (UG-3 year) 385 Students placed (UG-3 year) 7 Median package (UG-3 year) INR 84,000 per annum Total students (MBA) 72 Students placed (MBA) 15 Median package (MBA) INR 1.68 LPA NOTE: The above details are fetched from the NIRF report 2024.

faqs.question: What is the overall intake at Rabiammal Ahamed Maideen College For Women for all courses together?
faqs.answer: The seats availability for offered courses at Rabiammal Ahamed Maideen College For Women goes up to 1055.

faqs.question: What is the placement scenario for MBA at Rabiammal Ahamed Maideen College for Women?
faqs.answer: Out of 72 MBA graduates 15 were placed during the 2023 placements. Earlier, 13 out of 77 students were laced. Looking at the past three years' data (2021 to 2023), the number of MBA students placed has improved year-on-year. The median package has also increased from 2021 to 2023. Refer to the table below to know the Rabiammal Ahamed Maideen College For Women MBA placement trends: Particulars MBA Placement Statistics (2021) MBA Placement Statistics (2022) MBA Placement Statistics (2023) Total students 72 77 72 Students placed 10 13 15 Median package INR 1.20 LPA INR 1.20 LPA INR 1.68 LPA NOTE: The above details are fetched from the NIRF report 2024.

average_package.title: Rabiammal Ahamed Maideen College For Women Average Package 2024

faqs.question: What is the average placement package of Rabiammal Ahamed Maideen College for Women?
faqs.answer: The Rabiammal Ahamed Maideen College For Women average package has not been released on the official website. However, the 2024 NIRF report contains the median package for UG and PG courses. From 2021 to 2023, a fluctuating trend was recorded in the median package of UG (3-year) courses. On the other hand, the MBA median package has been stagnant in 2021 and 2022 which later increased in 2023. Refer to the table below to know the Rabiammal Ahamed Maideen College For Women packages trend: Course Median Package (2021) Median Package (2022) Median Package (2023) UG (3-year) INR 1.20 LPA INR 1.76 LPA INR 84,000 per annum MBA INR 1.20 LPA INR 1.20 LPA INR 1.68 LPA
